name: software-design-philosophy
description: Manage software complexity through deep modules, information hiding, and strategic programming. Use when the user mentions "module design", "API too complex", "shallow class", "complexity budget", "strategic vs tactical", "deep module", "information leakage", or "pass-through method". Also trigger when reviewing interface designs for simplicity, evaluating whether an abstraction is pulling its weight, or choosing between general-purpose and special-purpose approaches.
